idea-plugin.name: TokenPulse
idea-plugin.description:
TokenPulse aggregates token balances and credit usage across multiple AI providers directly in your IDE status bar. Track your AI spending in real-time.

Beta Release: This is an early release. Features may change and some functionality may be incomplete. Please report issues on GitHub.

Supported Providers:
  • OpenRouter — Provisioning Key with credits tracking
  • Cline — API Key for personal and organization accounts
  • OpenAI Platform — Admin API Key with usage/costs via Organization APIs
  • ChatGPT (Codex CLI) — CLI-based usage tracking via Codex CLI
  • Nebius AI Studio — Cookie-based auth with trial/paid balance
  • Claude Code — CLI-based usage extraction
Features:
  • Live credit & token balance in the status bar
  • Dashboard with per-account status, credits, and timestamps
  • Configurable auto-refresh with smart TTL caching
  • Secure credential storage via IntelliJ PasswordSafe
idea-plugin.change-notes:
0.4.0 — Session robustness, unified Xiaomi, and a richer tooltip (2026-07-23)
  • Nebius session auto-refresh: silently re-mints the CSRF token when it rotates, so a still-valid session keeps working without reconnecting
  • Unified Xiaomi MiMo provider: pay-as-you-go balance and Token Plan Credits now live in one account (status bar shows dollars, tooltip shows both)
  • Rich status-bar tooltip: native Swing popup with real progress bars, theme-aware colors, and humanized quota reset times
  • Claude Code: multi-account support plus usage via the OAuth API (with automatic token refresh)
  • Codex/ChatGPT: usage read directly via the OAuth API instead of a CLI subprocess
  • Smarter notifications: refresh-failure hints are now tailored to each provider's auth type

0.2.0 — Stabilization and Codex CLI update (2026-04-22)
  • Codex CLI integration: ChatGPT now uses Codex CLI for simpler setup without OAuth
  • Improved reliability: Better credential handling and reduced notification spam
  • Nebius improvements: Enhanced balance extraction and connection handling
  • Code quality: Removed dead code, fixed warnings, improved exception handling
  • Removed: Legacy ChatGPT OAuth flow (replaced with Codex CLI)

0.1.0 — Initial beta release (2026-03-10)
  • Multi-provider support: OpenRouter, Cline, OpenAI Platform, Nebius AI Studio, Claude Code
  • Status bar widget: Live aggregate balance in your IDE
  • Dashboard: Per-account details with status, credits, tokens, and timestamps
  • Settings page: Full CRUD account management under Tools → TokenPulse
  • Smart caching: TTL-based auto-refresh with single-flight coalescing
  • Secure storage: All credentials stored via IntelliJ PasswordSafe
  • Onboarding: Welcome and "What's New" notifications

action.description: Shows a table with all configured token balances
Force a refresh of all configured account balances
Configure AI provider accounts and refresh interval
